fn_def_list.fn_code:
int
insn_table_depth(insn_table *table)
{
  int depth = 0;
  insn_table_traverse_tree(table,
			   NULL,
			   &depth,
			   1,
			   NULL, /*start*/
			   update_depth,
			   NULL, /*end*/
			   NULL); /*padding*/
  return depth;
}
